---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? Describe the use case rather than
a specific solution, if you can — it helps find the best fit.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches the public API, a sketch of the surface (a builder
method, a track-spec option, a sink) is helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues, or anything else.
